rationale: The two papers are tightly aligned on core phenomena: the citing study examines firm-level advertising spending changes during contraction/expansion, while the cited paper analyzes advertising’s business-cycle sensitivity across countries and its consequences. Given this direct topical overlap in business-cycle advertising behavior (and the citing paper’s stated gap about downturn advertising decisions), the citation is plausibly foundational/background-theory rather than an incidental mention, so it should be reviewed in stage two.
